title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Yes Bank Global Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Yes Bank Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Yes Bank Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Yes Bank Global Group:
Yes Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank Global Group!
